data.title: 25 youth from 14 countries gather in Beijing for cultural exchange at Youth Salon on China Studies.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, Beijing hosted the Youth Salon on China Studies, which gathered 25 young media professionals and students representing 14 different countries. This event aimed to facilitate discussions on cultural links, promote dialogue, and share diverse viewpoints on various topics.

data.title: Essent Group (NYSE: ESNT) likely to report lower Q2 earnings; expected earnings at $1.71/share and revenue at $317.85 million. -Benzinga
data.description: Essent Group Ltd. (NYSE: ESNT) is scheduled to announce its second-quarter earnings before the market opens on Friday, August 8. Analysts predict the Hamilton, Bermuda-based company will report earnings of $1.71 per share, a decrease from $1.91 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be $317.85 million, up from $312.94 million in the previous year. In the first quarter, Essent Group exceeded earnings expectations. The closing price of Essent Group shares on Thursday was $57.02, marking a 1.4% decrease. For more details and analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

data.title: SBI Holdings refutes claims of applying for a Bitcoin-XRP dual ETF in Japan; no crypto-asset ETF filings made.
data.description: A representative from SBI Holdings clarified to Cointelegraph that the company has not submitted any applications for cryptocurrency asset ETFs.

data.title: Coloplast A/S to release 9M 2024/25 earnings on Aug 19, 2025, at 07.30 CEST and host conference call at 11.00 CEST.
data.description: On Tuesday, August 19, 2025, from 11:00 am to 12:00 pm CEST, Coloplast will hold a conference call regarding its 9-month 2024/25 interim financial results, scheduled for release at 7:30 am CEST the same day. The company will present the financial outcomes, and field inquiries from investors and financial analysts. A presentation will be accessible on Coloplast’s website roughly an hour before the call. The webcast of the conference will be accessible both during and after the session.

data.title: teamLab将于2025年10月7日在日本京都开设新馆—teamLab Biovortex Kyoto，占地1万平方米，首次作品包括Massless Amorphous Sculpture和Forest of Resonating Lamps。
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, teamLab Biovortex Kyoto, a permanent art museum under the art collective teamLab, will open on October 7, 2025, in the southeastern area of Kyoto Prefecture. This museum, part of a larger project in the area, will be teamLab's largest in Japan, covering over 10,000 square meters. To prepare for the opening, teamLab is creating several new artworks, including pieces never before exhibited in Japan. Some of the first artworks announced for the new museum include Massless Amorphous Sculpture, Morphing Continuum, The Eternal Universe of Words, The Way of Birds, and Forest of Resonating Lamps. Massless Amorphous Sculpture is one of the debut pieces in Japan, utilizing teamLab's Environmental Phenomena concept to create a floating giant sculpture based on unique environmental effects. Currently exhibited at teamLab Phenomena in Abu Dhabi and an arts center in Miami, this will be its first appearance in Japan. Tickets are now available on the official website.

data.title: Plains All American Pipeline (PAA) to report Q2 earnings on Aug 8; expected to show 33 cents/share profit and $12.86 billion revenue. Shares rose 0.1% to $17.87 before the report.
data.description: Plains All American Pipeline, L.P. (NASDAQ: PAA) is set to announce its second-quarter earnings before the market opens on Friday, August 8. Analysts are predicting earnings of 33 cents per share, an improvement from 31 cents per share in the same quarter last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $12.86 billion, slightly lower than the previous year's $12.93 billion. Recently, Plains All American Pipeline finalized a deal to sell its NGL business to Keyera for $3.75 billion. Following this news, the company's shares saw a minor increase of 0.1% and closed at $17.87 on Thursday. For more details and analyst ratings, interested individuals can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Sivers Semiconductors appoints Heine Thorsgaard as new CFO to enhance growth capabilities. (Characters: 91)
data.description: Sivers Semiconductors AB, based in KISTA, Sweden, has appointed Heine Thorsgaard as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) to enhance capabilities for future growth. The company, known for its expertise in photonics and wireless technologies, made the critical move on August 8, 2025. Sivers Semiconductors AB, listed as SIVE.ST, is a prominent player in the global market.
